mapper.sql: select item_id,inventory_lonely_quantity,sales_amount, inventory_id, spu_no, change_type, unit, stock_lonely_quantity, stock_quantity,inventory_quantity, initial_inventory_cost, storage_amount, inventory_status, inventory_result,comment, sales_quantity, sales_lonely_quantity,remaining_quantity, status, price, create_time, last_modify_time from store_warehouse_inventory_item
mapper.insert:
insert into store_warehouse_inventory_item
inventory_id, spu_no, change_type, unit, stock_lonely_quantity, stock_quantity, inventory_lonely_quantity, inventory_quantity, initial_inventory_cost, storage_amount, inventory_status, inventory_result, sales_quantity, sales_lonely_quantity, sales_amount, remaining_quantity, status, price, comment, create_time, last_modify_time,
#{inventoryId}, #{spuNo}, #{changeType}, #{unit}, #{stockLonelyQuantity}, #{stockQuantity}, #{inventoryLonelyQuantity}, #{inventoryQuantity}, #{initialInventoryCost}, #{storageAmount}, #{inventoryStatus}, #{inventoryResult}, #{salesQuantity}, #{salesLonelyQuantity}, #{salesAmount}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{status}, #{price}, #{comment}, #{createTime}, #{lastModifyTime},
mapper.update: update store_warehouse_inventory_item set status=0,last_modify_time = now() where item_id = #{itemId}

update store_warehouse_inventory_item set status=0,last_modify_time = now() where item_id in
#{itemId}
update store_warehouse_inventory_item set status=0,last_modify_time = now() where inventory_id = #{inventoryId}
mapper.select:
-- SELECT * FROM ( -- SELECT -- t1.spu_no spuNo, t2.name spuName, t1.main_unit_id unit, t3.name unitname, '1' unittype -- FROM -- store_goods_spu_unit t1, -- store_goods_spu t2 , -- store_goods_sales_unit t3 -- WHERE -- t1.main_unit_id = t3.unit_id AND t1.spu_no = t2.spu_no -- UNION ALL -- SELECT -- t1.spu_no spuNo, t2.name spuName, t1.sub_unit_id unit, t3.name unitname, '2' unittype -- FROM -- store_goods_spu_unit t1, -- store_goods_spu t2 , -- store_goods_sales_unit t3 -- WHERE -- t1.sub_unit_id = t3.unit_id AND t1.spu_no = t2.spu_no -- AND t1.main_unit_id != t1.sub_unit_id -- ) tb -- ORDER BY spuNo,unittype
SELECT t1.spu_no spuNo, t1.NAME spuName, t1.taxrate, t2.main_unit_id unit, t3.NAME unitname, t2.sub_unit_id subunit, t4.NAME subunitname FROM store_goods_spu t1, store_goods_spu_unit t2, store_goods_sales_unit t3, store_goods_sales_unit t4 WHERE t2.main_unit_id = t3.unit_id AND t2.sub_unit_id = t4.unit_id AND t1.spu_no = t2.spu_no ORDER BY t1.spu_no

SELECT t1.inventory_no inventoryno, t1.warehouse_id warehouseid, t4.store_name warehouseName, t1.dept_id deptid, t5.dept_name deptname, t2.spu_no spuno, t3.NAME spuname, t2.stock_quantity, t2.stock_lonely_quantity stocklonelyquantity, t2.inventory_quantity inventoryquantity, t2.inventory_lonely_quantity inventorylonelyquantity, t2.inventory_result inventoryresult, t1.quantity totalQuantity, t1.create_time createtime, t1.intentory_date intentoryDate, t2.comment FROM store_warehouse_inventory t1, store_warehouse_inventory_item t2, store_goods_spu t3, store_house t4, sys_dept t5 WHERE t1.STATUS = '1' AND t1.inventory_id = t2.inventory_id AND t2.STATUS = '1' AND t5.dept_id = t1.dept_id AND t2.spu_no = t3.spu_no AND t4.store_id = t1.warehouse_id
AND t1.dept_id = #{deptId}
and t1.intentory_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{startTime},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
order by t1.intentory_date desc LIMIT 10000
